review_title: The Ultimate Tool for Efficient Multilingual Communication
description: I had the chance to work with the United Language Group Octave (ULGO) platform during my internship at the university. I was given the responsibility of looking into and assessing various translation management systems that might be used by a entreprenour while working in a project of the IT department. I was particularly impressed by ULGO's user-friendly interface and effective capabilities, including real-time collaboration and process automation. I was able to improve our localization operations overall by streamlining translation workflows, monitoring project progress, and other tasks. Overall, I had a good experience with ULGO, and I think any company in need of translation management solutions would benefit greatly from using it.
author: Anthony C.
pros: United Language Group Octave is a powerful tool for businesses looking to communicate effectively in a multilingual environment. With its extensive features and user-friendly interface, managing tasks like translation, interpretation, and localization are made simple. The platform also provides real-time collaboration, a complete translation memory, and quality assurance tools to guarantee accurate and efficient communication.
cons: One potential drawback of United Language Group Octave is its cost. The software can be expensive for small businesses or those with limited language needs. Additionally, while the software is highly customizable, the level of customization can be overwhelming for some users who may prefer a more simplified approach.

description: The software keeps me well informed from project start to project finish. This includes translation submission, project estimate, translation timeline, translation receipt and finally, the payment.
author: Jonathan H.
pros: My experience with ULG Octave has been nothing less than great. The software keeps me well informed from project start to project finish. This includes translation submission, project estimate, translation timeline, translation receipt and finally, the payment.
cons: All points of contact with ULG Octave has been positive. No cons to report.

review_title: A multilingual translation using advanced tools for efficient translation management, thanks to Unit
description: I am an architecture student and I received subjects such as differential equations related to everyday language, so for a better understanding of this I had the opportunity to use United Language Group Octave, during an entire school year, although in summary I must say that this platform is became an essential tool for me, helping me perform calculations and solve equations efficiently, as well as explore complex concepts and perform numerical analysis quickly and accurately. In short, United Language Group Octave helped me a lot to understand and apply concepts of differential equations in the field of architecture, improving my academic performance.
author: Isaac A.
pros: One of the key points of this tool that I liked the most are its different functionalities that helped me streamline the translation process, such as the translation memory, which stores and reuses previously translated segments and thus improves consistency and the efficiency. On the other hand, and as an important advantage, I liked the possibility of translating into multiple languages, giving me a more complete solution that helped me meet certain global communication needs.
cons: As the only negative point, I must say that it is a complicated tool to learn to use, it requires time, information and it is a tedious process.

description: I use them almost every day and its a great experience
author: cheryl K.
pros: they are able to translate anything we get in
cons: i wish they could process them more quickly

review_title: ULG Provides the Best and Very Timely Translations
description: We've had a partnership with ULG for decades - that implies a LOT. They have always been very professional with us; they provide top-notch translations. Our requests aren't always the easiest and they are always on it, getting us what we need. Our account manager is the best ([sensitive content hidden]) and is very responsive. It is safe to say, we would recommend ULG.
author: Lisa B.
pros: Reliable Professional Timely Translations are spot-on!
cons: Can't think of anything we don't like, sorry!
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: ULG routinely provides an excellent vendor experience
author: Lisa S.
pros: *ULG provides prompt quotes and timeframes *Near-perfect delivery rate *Very responsive *Simple interface
cons: Very rarely translations are not delivered on time.

review_title: Best Translation Company I've Ever Used
description: I really like ULG and will be recommending them to other companies. I appreciate their attentiveness to my needs and their ability to provide translation in nearly any language.
author: Chelsea B.
pros: ULG provides quick turnaround times and reasonable prices. Whenever I have a questions or need assistance, they get back to me same day. I really appreciate their communication.
cons: This is the only translation product I have used, so I don't have anything to compare it to. Therefore, I don't have any cons.

review_title: ULG Octave is a good choice
description: Octave is easy to use/navigate, contains the pertinent information I need, and has not experienced any downtime or system failure during my use of it.
author: Justin M.
pros: Having all the project information readily available in the Octave portal is very convenient. The ability to see where projects are during the various stages of processing, reporting capabilities, as well as historical project data, in a self-serve UI saves time and effort.
cons: The portal's 'time out' parameter is a little short for my tastes.

description: I am always please with the service and results we get from ULG.
author: Claudia J.
pros: Customer Service is excellent. Everyone is willing to help push your project forward.
cons: I have not found a down side to date. There has not been a time when service was not provided in a timely and quality manner.

description: Overall, my experience with United Language Group Octave has been very positive, and I highly recommend it to anyone who needs to communicate across languages on a regular basis.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: As someone who frequently communicates with people from different countries and cultures, I found United Language Group Octave to be an excellent solution for streamlining multilingual communication. One of the biggest pros of using Octave is its ability to provide real-time translation for both written and spoken communication. This has been incredibly helpful in ensuring that everyone is on the same page and avoiding misunderstandings.
cons: The only downside I have experienced is that the translation quality can sometimes be a bit inconsistent, especially with more complex language and technical terminology.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Usar ULG en proyectos de traducción.
author: Cristian Gabriel A.
pros: Dispone un enfoque personalizado y adaptado a las necesidades específicas de cada cliente. Te deja claro que cuenta con una gran cantidad de traductores por todo el mundo, con una cifra mayor a los 2000 lingüistas. Dispone de una propia plataforma de gestión de la traducción, permitiendo a nosotros como clientes, tener una adecuada administración de nuestros proyectos. Así como el acceso a informes en tiempo real.
cons: El precio para proyectos pequeños podría ser un obstáculo.Algunos de los plazos no suelen ser de mucha utilidad, dando paso a estimaciones de tiempo poco realistas.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: We contacted several translation companies after a change in internal management almost ten years ago, and ULG responded the quickest and most often (we had a lot of questions), so we chose to go with them. We have never regretted the decision to choose ULG as our translation service provider. They consistently provide quick, accurate translations of our single- and multi-language documents, laid out in print-ready files.
author: Lori B.
pros: ULG has great customer service, with our representative always quick to reply to questions and help us in any way needed. Quotes are provided quickly, translations are almost always done on time, and any errors (rare) are corrected quickly as well.
cons: The only negative thing about ULG is that we seem to get a new representative every year, but every one of them has been helpful and competent at their job, so it's not a deal breaker.

description: Very positive, very satisfied, the issues I mentioned were all minor and do not impact our overall satisfaction.
author: Ian M.
pros: Great customer service, quick turnaround, overall our clients are very satisfied.
cons: Not that we have a solution but the portal submission (having to have an account) means we can only have certain people submit all jobs on behalf of a larger population.

author: Mikel L.
pros: I use ULG for packaging, e-commerce copy, and instruction manual translations. The turnaround is quick and the work is always perfect. The people I interact with are friendly and helpful.
cons: I haven't experienced any part of ULG that I dislike in the past two years.

review_title: Satisfied with this product and service
description: Easy to use, captures only the accurate information required for Translation.
author: Umarani E.
pros: Very user friendly and captures accurate information.
cons: No, this software is very convenient to use.

description: Ottimo software per tradurre. Personalmente l'ho usato per tradurre degli articoli scientifici e mi sono trovato benissimo. Unica pecca è la mal interpretazione di alcune lingue, tipo il giapponese, ma confido in un miglioramento. Consigliato.
author: Gioacchino T.
pros: Traduzione veloce e ottima IA per riconoscere una lingua in automatico
cons: Qualche volta c'è qualche errore di traduzione per alcune lingue complicate
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: excellent, we get rebate end of each year
author: phil S.
pros: very friendly company to work Customer support very good Very competitive
cons: none but only on one occasion product was not delivered on time but I was kept informed so end result was good

review_title: ULG is great for medical device labeling translations.
author: Belinda A.
pros: ULG is very supportive from a Customer Service standpoint. They work hard to make sure they meet their customer's needs.
cons: On occasion, changes to a document are overlooked which require their attention. Once pointed out, they quickly address the required changes.

review_title: Octave is good for my translation needs!
description: My overall experience with ULG Octave has been a positive one! I really appreciate the good customer support when I have needed assistance.
author: Laurel M.
pros: When I need a letter translated, I am able to send it to ULG Octave and receive it back within a specific time frame. It allows me to stay organized and on track! I also really like the great customer service I have received when I have needed assistance.
cons: One con of ULG Octave is that the submission form is not always user friendly. It asks a lot of questions, not all which apply to the translation.

review_title: Rompiendo barreras, United Language Group Octave
description: Nunca noté errores gramaticales en los mensajes recibidos, se entendían a la perfección, además integran bastante bien la inteligencia artificial. Sin embargo, siento que otros productos similares con menos costo usan mejor esta integración de la IA. Pero de todas formas, ULG es sinónimo de calidad al momento de traducciones.
author: Daniel M.
pros: Para lograr enviar o recibir instrucciones, o simplemente mensajes en otros idiomas, es una excelente herramienta. Y posee un control de calidad que se nota al recibir los mensajes, no tiene errores gramaticales.
cons: Es complicado de utilizar debido a la gran plataforma que representa.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Based on my experience using Octave™ Translation Management System, I found it to be a very useful tool for translation, with accurate results, a simple interface, and efficient turnaround times. While the cost may be a consideration for small jobs, the overall value of the software is high. Overall, I highly recommend Octave™ Translation Management System for anyone in need of a reliable translation tool.
author: Felipe M.
pros: I have used it for some time and found it to be a convenient and efficient tool for translation. The translations are accurate and the system also has a simple interface and is easy to navigate. The quick turnaround times are also great.
cons: From my experience I did not find much negative points on this application yet. The cost can be a issue for small jobs.

author: Mary Beth T.
pros: Easy to use, terrific customer service. Timely responses often coming in ahead of schedule.
cons: Can be costly for small jobs as there is a minimum charge.

description: I have used Octave for several years now. I depend on it to help translate presentations, advertisements, applications, and other materials for a summer youth employment that we run every year. We appreciate United Language Group's consistent, quality and reliable translations produced through the Octave website.
author: Charisma C.
pros: I like that the software allows me to quickly have documents translated for our clients.
cons: N/A It is easy to use, and customer service is great.

review_title: Traducir trabajos de diseño y moda de forma automatizada
author: Bertha V.
pros: Puede convertirse en una herramienta adecuada para el sector de la moda en el dado caso que se requiera traducir sus trabajos a varios idiomas.
cons: Puede que sea adecuado para grandes empresas destinadas a la moda, sin embargo si una empresa pequeña o un taller autónomo desea utilizar este software seria un desperdicio de recursos y dinero.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
